## Type of change

- [ ] New examples added to an existing tool
- [ ] New tool added to an existing knowledge base
- [ ] New knowledge base package
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Core engine change

## Checklist

- [ ] YAML is valid (no syntax errors)
- [ ] All `intent` fields in `examples` match a phrase in the `intents` list
- [ ] Commands are real and copy-paste ready
- [ ] Titles are sentence case and descriptive
- [ ] Platform-specific examples have an `os` tag (`linux-only` or `macos-only`)
- [ ] Tested with `bun run dev -- <intent phrase>`
- [ ] New tools have at least 5 examples and 8 intent phrases
